title: Design for construction of landscape features
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design for construction of landscape features demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Design aspects of construction for landscape features in a range of materials

pcs.text: Develop concept designs for construction of selected landscape features according to client requirements and budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop concept designs for construction of selected landscape features according to client requirements and budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop concept designs for construction of selected landscape features according to client requirements and budget.

pcs.text: Source and record survey levels, site gradients and elevations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and record survey levels, site gradients and elevations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and record survey levels, site gradients and elevations.

pcs.text: Draw construction details for landscape features according to landscape design concepts

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draw construction details for landscape features according to landscape design concepts.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draw drainage plans according to national construction code and landscape design concept.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate a range of materials used in construction of landscape features into design.
